occupation: VP of Engineering at Northwind Analytics. Building data platforms and mentoring engineering teams.
headline: VP of Engineering at Northwind Analytics. Building data platforms and mentoring engineering teams.
summary:
I'm a systems-minded engineering leader with a track record of taking data platforms from prototype to production scale. My focus is on building small, high-trust teams that ship reliable software and grow into technical leaders themselves.

I care about clear architecture, honest postmortems, and giving engineers room to own problems end to end. Outside of shipping product, I spend time mentoring early-career engineers and speaking at local meetups about distributed systems and data engineering.

Specialties: distributed systems, data platforms, cloud infrastructure, and engineering leadership.

experiences.title: VP of Engineering
experiences.description:
Leading the platform and data engineering organization. Responsible for the team building Northwind's real-time analytics pipeline, serving thousands of enterprise customers.

Grew the engineering team from 8 to 40, established an on-call and incident review process, and led the migration from a monolithic service to an event-driven microservices architecture.

experiences.title: Senior Staff Engineer
experiences.description: Designed and built the company's first streaming data pipeline, processing over 2 billion events per day. Led the adoption of infrastructure-as-code across the engineering org and mentored a team of six engineers.

experiences.title: Software Engineer
experiences.description: Built backend services for a B2B SaaS product used by logistics companies. Focused on API design, database performance, and reliability.

accomplishment_publications.name: Scaling Event-Driven Architectures: Lessons from Production
accomplishment_publications.description: An article covering the tradeoffs and failure modes encountered while migrating a monolithic analytics platform to an event-driven architecture.

accomplishment_projects.title: OpenPipeline
accomplishment_projects.description: An open-source toolkit for building declarative streaming data pipelines. Started as an internal tool and grew into a project with contributors across several companies.

recommendations:
Priya Nair

I worked with Jordan for three years on the platform team at Cascade Data Systems. Jordan has a rare combination of deep technical skill and genuine care for the people on the team. Every design review became a learning opportunity, and Jordan was always the first to dig into a production incident and turn it into a lesson for the whole org.

Marcus Chen

Jordan hired me as a junior engineer and pushed me to grow faster than I thought possible. Clear feedback, high standards, and always available when something broke at 2am. One of the best managers I've had.
